abilities.name: Demise (Scamper Away)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may summon a Malifaux Rat within 1" of it.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Taint
triggers.text: The target gains a Blight token.

actions.name: Prey on the Weak
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. The target gains a Blight token. If the target is lower cost than this model, place this model into base contact with the target and then declare a (melee) attack targeting it, which deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Fever Bloom
triggers.text: Remove a Blight token from the target. The target is dealt 1 damage and gains a Stunned token.

actions.name: Devouring Horde
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Remove an enemy marker within range.

triggers.name: Sacrifice the Scurried
triggers.text: Kill another friendly vermin model within 3" of this model. This model heals 2.
